'''yachuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rly|rly]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rly|rly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yachuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæchijith|yæchijith]] || [[word:yæchijij|yæchijij]] || [[word:yæchijish|yæchijish]] || [[word:yæchiji|yæchiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yachuchujuth|yachuchujuth]] || [[word:yachuchujuj|yachuchujuj]] || [[word:yachuchujush|yachuchujush]] || [[word:yachuchuju|yachuchuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yachujuth|yachujuth]] || [[word:yachujuj|yachujuj]] || [[word:yachujush|yachujush]] || [[word:yachuju|yachuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yachufjuth|yachufjuth]] || [[word:yachufjuj|yachufjuj]] || [[word:yachufjush|yachufjush]] || [[word:yachufjuf|yachufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yachujuthu|yachujuthu]] || [[word:yachujuju|yachujuju]] || [[word:yachujushu|yachujushu]] || [[word:yachujuku|yachujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yachujuth|yachujuth]] || [[word:yachujuj|yachujuj]] || [[word:yachujush|yachujush]] || [[word:yachuju|yachuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yachujuthul|yachujuthul]] || [[word:yachujujul|yachujujul]] || [[word:yachujushul|yachujushul]] || [[word:yachujukul|yachujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yachujuthuthu|yachujuthuthu]] || [[word:yachujujuju|yachujujuju]] || [[word:yachujushushu|yachujushushu]] || [[word:yachujuku|yachujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yachujuthun|yachujuthun]] || [[word:yachujujun|yachujujun]] || [[word:yachujushun|yachujushun]] || [[word:yachujukun|yachujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yachujuthuoro|yachujuthuoro]] || [[word:yachujujuoro|yachujujuoro]] || [[word:yachujushuoro|yachujushuoro]] || [[word:yachujukuoro|yachujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
